title: Nemesis
description: At the end of every other turn, gains [gold]Intangible[/gold] [blue]1[/blue].
smart_description: At the end of every other turn, gains [gold]Intangible[/gold] [blue]1[/blue].
notes: Alternates between applying Intangible 1 and removing any existing Intangible power. Tracks state with internal toggle.
